evals.prompt: Can you review PR #42 in this repo without disrupting my current work?
evals.expected_output: Agent uses `grove fetch pr/42` to create a worktree, then `grove to <name> --peek` to switch without hooks or tmux, reviews the PR, and offers to run `grove rm` when done.

evals.prompt: I want to run the test suite against the cache-redesign branch while keeping my current branch checked out.
evals.expected_output: Agent uses `grove test cache-redesign` to run tests in the other worktree without switching context.

evals.prompt: Start the dev environment for this feature in an isolated stack so it doesn't conflict with what's running on main.
evals.expected_output: Agent checks `grove ps --json` for free slots, then runs `grove up --isolated --slot N` to start a port-offset Docker stack for the current worktree.
